---
title: "Exercise 3: Analytical data architecture"
---

::: {.learning-objectives}
Design fact/dimension schemata from business questions and operational data.
:::

::: callout-note
TODO: existing exercise sheet?
https://github.com/ShantanilBagchi/DataCamp/blob/master/SQL%20Courses/Database%20Design/Solutions.md
https://gitlab.ost.ch/db/datana/-/blob/master/Uebungen/02_DW_OLAP/README.adoc

Use Mermaid for illustration?
:::

## Exam prep

TODO : include specific questions/tasks that could be included in the exam.
